description: Style NotePumped up kicks have never looked this good! playboy comes up witj a high-top sneaker. Indulge in high street hip hop cool and pair these high tops with denims gathered at the ankles or rolled up at the ankle. Style them with an all black ensemble or wear it with a monochrome tee and a simple pair of denims. Product DetailsRed shiny high-top upper with central lace-ups and and an ankle strap with a Velcro closure Fabric padded innerEVA midsole with foxingTPU outsole  with herringbone grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a cotton swab to remove dus
